page: Google Cloud Platform a3-edgegpu-8g is an accelerator-optimized server powered by an Intel Xeon 8481C processor with 208 vCPUs and 104 physical cores running at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It features 1872 GB of system memory, providing 9.0 GB per core. The server is equipped with eight NVIDIA H100 GPUs from the Hopper architecture, delivering a combined 637 GB of VRAM. Local storage consists of 6432 GB of NVMe SSD.

Benchmark data indicates top-tier performance across multiple compute and memory metrics. The multi-core CPU performance measured via stress-ng and PassMark CPU tests ranks in the top 10%, aided by advanced vector and matrix extensions including AVX-512 and AMX. Memory bandwidth for both small and large blocks is exceptionally high, also placing in the top 10%. In database and cache operations, the server achieved top-tier results, including 177.5 million operations per second in Redis SET tests and high throughput in PassMark database operations. Large-model LLM text generation benchmarks show 29.51 tokens per second for a medium 7B model and 3.7 tokens per second for a large 70B model.

Given the high density of eight enterprise-grade H100 GPUs, massive system memory, and local NVMe SSD storage, this server represents a highly specialized, capital-intensive hardware profile. It is qualitatively optimized for workloads requiring massive parallel processing capabilities rather than general-purpose computing. The primary workload fits include large-scale deep learning, LLM training and inference, high-performance computing, ray tracing, and intensive database operations.
description: Google Cloud Platform a3-edgegpu-8g is an accelerator-optimized server designed for high-performance computing and machine learning workloads. It features an Intel Xeon 8481C processor with 208 vCPUs, 1872 GB of system memory, and 6432 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. The server is equipped with eight NVIDIA H100 GPUs, providing a total of 637 GB of VRAM. Benchmark results place this server in the top 10% for multi-core CPU performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations, with Redis SET operations reaching 177.5 million operations per second. It also supports advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 and AMX. This hardware profile is optimized for demanding workloads such as large language model training and inference, deep learning, ray tracing, and high-throughput database applications.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform a3-edgegpu-8g is an accelerator-optimized server featuring 208 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 1872 GB RAM, 6432 GB NVMe SSD, and eight NVIDIA H100 GPUs with 637 GB VRAM for high-performance workloads.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform a3-edgegpu-8g features 208 vCPUs, 1872 GB RAM, 6432 GB NVMe SSD, and eight NVIDIA H100 GPUs for intensive AI and HPC workloads.
tagline: An accelerator-optimized platform featuring eight NVIDIA H100 GPUs and 208 vCPUs for demanding deep learning and high-performance computing workloads.
bullet_points: Eight NVIDIA H100 GPUs with 637 GB total VRAM
208 Intel Xeon vCPUs with 1872 GB system memory
6432 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance
Best suited for LLM training, deep learning, and HPC workloads
